title: Formula Icon Repositioning and View Formula Explorer Link
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the formula icon positioned next to the edit and history icons and a 'View Formula Explorer' link under the Definition section, so that I can quickly access formula details.
description:
Repositions the formula icon from its current location to sit alongside the edit and history action icons in the dictionary field table.

Adds a 'View Formula Explorer' link under the 'Definition' section in the field detail sidebar, visible only when a formula exists for the field. The link is prefixed with the selected formula icon (chemistry/flask/test SVG — developer's choice).
acceptance_criteria: Formula icon repositioned next to edit and history icons
View Formula Explorer link appears under Definition when a formula exists
Link includes the formula icon in front of the text
ux_changes: Formula icon moved to action icons row. 'View Formula Explorer' link with icon added under Definition section, conditional on formula existence.
implementation_notes: Three SVG icon options provided (chemistry, flask, test); developer chose the best-fitting option.
comment_summary: Developer asked which icon to use; product owner said whichever looks best. Developer implemented and pushed to staging for review.
